config_template.output_tensor: optional preallocated tensor of same shape

applicability_notes: Unary elementwise 'greater than zero' comparison. Replaces a torch comparison-against-zero-constant subsequence (torch.gt(x, 0) / x > 0). Output is boolean-like (0/1) in the tensor dtype. Supports preallocated output_tensor and command-queue id. Fusable into unary op chains via unary_with_param activation fusion where supported.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.gtz(input_tensor, output_tensor=output_tensor, queue_id=cq_id)
